response: Prior to producing *Nine Days that Changed the World*, Newt Gingrich was a political consultant and worked closely with former U.S. Representative and Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich. He was executive director of the National Republican Congressional Committee in the mid-1980s and worked for GOPAC, a political action committee that was Gingrich's main vehicle for the long campaign that led to the Republican takeover of the House in 1994.
